name: Irene's Noodles and Sauerkraut
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over low heat. Add the chopped onions and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
2. Rinse the sauerkraut in a strainer with half a cup of water. Drain the excess liquid and add the sauerkraut to the skillet. Mix well.
3. Cook the egg noodles according to package directions for 5 minutes. Drain and add the remaining 6 tablespoons of butter. Stir to combine.
4. Add the noodle mixture to the sauerkraut mixture, stirring until well mixed. Spoon the contents into a 2 1/2- to 3-quart casserole or dish. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
5. When ready to bake, remove the casserole from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Dot the top of the casserole with butter. Bake for 45 minutes.
